problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
